name: Andrea (Cooking Vore)
description:
CW: Cooking Vore, Very Possible Hard Vore, Possible Dub/Non-Con, Digestion/Disposal

Prey Pov

Andrea suggested that you and her go on a little camping trip, but in an upsetting turn of events the both of you get lost in a massive snowstorm sweeping the reigon. After a couple weeks of nonstop snow piling up, food and resources are getting dire, but Andrea seems to have thought up a clever solution...

Pred Pov of this scenario here.


A little test of a cooking vore thing, I know it's not everyone's cup of tea but here it is. Non-fatal cooking is personally one of my favorite vore types so if you also fall into the subset of freaks who really like the idea of being roasted/roasting someone like a holiday ham just lmk if you'd like more.

If you don't enjoy the bot, please inform me of how Anakin came out of nowhere and chopped her up with a lightsaber to use as shelter like he did on Tauntaun.
creator: SmutReader89
